given: the board mounts with default sample tasks
then: summary cards, task cards, and the debug panel are visible

given: the user enters a new task and toggles its status
when: input and click events are dispatched
then: the task list, summary, title, localStorage, and debug patch output all update

given: the board contains multiple tasks from different teams and priorities
when: the user changes filters, search text, and sort mode
then: the visible list reflects the derived memoized result
the saved tasks are used as the initial state
